distutils.command.install_headers
Implements the Distutils 'install_headers' command, to install C/C++ header
files to the Python include directory.
Commandc
install_headersz
install C/C++ header files)
install-dir=
dz$directory to install header files to)
force
fz-force installation (overwrite existing files)r
install_dirr
outfiles
self
9/usr/lib64/python3.9/distutils/command/install_headers.py
initialize_options
z"install_headers.initialize_optionsc
install)
set_undefined_optionsr	
finalize_options
z install_headers.finalize_optionsc
distribution
headersZ
mkpathr
Z	copy_filer
append)
header
run!
install_headers.runc
get_inputs+
install_headers.get_inputsc
get_outputs.
install_headers.get_outputsN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__Z
descriptionZ
user_optionsZ
boolean_optionsr
